name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Dallas, TX residents can visit Speedy Cash at 10201 Lake June Rd for payday and title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
Speedy Cash in Dallas, TX is located at 10201 Lake June Rd, a standalone storefront on the city's south side. The location is open Monday through Thursday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Friday from 8 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 6 PM. The store is closed on Sundays.

This Dallas location specializes in payday loans and title-based lending, offering quick cash solutions for residents who need funds between paychecks or for emergency expenses. You can call 972-329-0006 to speak with a loan officer, confirm current rates, or schedule an appointment. The team at this location can walk you through the application process and discuss all available loan products.

If you're a Dallas, TX resident looking for fast cash approval, bring your state ID, proof of current income, and banking information to speed up the application. Speedy Cash focuses on quick turnaround lending when traditional banks aren't an option.
pros: Multiple convenient Memphis-area locations (9 stores listed) with extended weekday hours (until 7pm Monday/Friday)
Transparent pricing model where borrowers know exact cost before signing loan documents
In-store vehicle appraisal for title loans eliminates need for separate valuation services
Lines of Credit up to $4,000 provide flexible borrowing with available credit that replenishes as principal is paid down
Bilingual customer service available in English and Spanish with dedicated phone numbers
Additional financial services including check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers at most locations
Online application initiation available to start process remotely before in-store completion
cons: Payday loans capped at $425 may be insufficient for larger emergencies, forcing borrowers to seek multiple loans
Title loans require vehicle collateral and proof of insurance, creating repayment risk tied to transportation access
No APR or fee information disclosed on website, requiring in-store consultation to understand true cost of borrowing
Payday loan structure (repayment in ~2 weeks) creates high risk of rollover/renewal debt cycles for borrowers with inconsistent income
Limited eligibility requiring active employment/income verification may exclude self-employed, gig workers, or those with irregular earnings
best_for: Employed individuals with stable paychecks needing $100-$425 for genuine short-term emergencies (medical, car repair, utility)
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency cash ($1,000-$4,000) who can reliably repay within installment timeline
Customers preferring in-person consultation and document review over purely online lending platforms
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual lending services in the Memphis Tennessee area
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals with stable income facing genuine short-term emergencies who value in-person consultation and don't have access to lower-cost credit options. Critical caveat: payday and title loans carry high interest rates and fees that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; this should only be considered after exhausting alternatives like employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans, or negotiating payment plans with creditors.
services: In-store vehicle appraisal for collateral loans
Green Dot Visa debit card services
In-store loan consultation and application completion
Multiple retail locations across Memphis metro area
meta_description: Dallas, TX payday loans at Speedy Cash (10201 Lake June Rd) — same-day approval available.
